arts.ttl: Spain boss De la Fuente responds to calls for Barcelona star to be rested
arts.sum: Spanish national team head coach Luis de la Fuente has on Friday issued a response to the ongoing calls for Lamine Yamal to be afforded a rest. Wide-man Lamine was…

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona vs Deportivo Alaves Lineups and Starting 11s for La Liga Matchday 9
arts.sum: Barca are looking to get back to winning ways in La Liga following their first loss of the season last weekend.

arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona hand Frenkie de Jong contract ultimatum as Man Utd & Chelsea register interest
arts.sum: Adamant that De Jong will not be allowed to follow Ousmane Dembele in leaving on a free, Barcelona are said to have warned the 27-year-old that he has three months to agree the terms of an extension before the club begin to plan for life without him. Barcelona have warned midfielder Frenkie de Jong that he must agree the terms of a new contract before the January transfer window if he wants to stay at the club, a report has claimed.

arts.ttl: Barcelona legend sends warning message to Hansi Flick
arts.sum: A one-time member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has on Friday fired a warning the way of Hansi Flick. As much comes amid the assurance that,…

arts.ttl: Official: Lamine Yamal bags La Liga player of the Month award for September
arts.sum: La Liga announced on Friday evening the winner of their Player of the Month award for September, and the second winner of the award this season. As speculated yesterday online,…

arts.ttl: WATCH: Szczęsny joins Barcelona training for first time
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczęsny joined up with his Barcelona team-mates on Friday in training for the first time since sealing his move to the Catalan giants . Barcelona’s latest addition to the squad isn’t expected to be match fit for a little while, with the international break coming at a good time for the former Juventus man.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star slowly ‘winning over’ Hansi Flick
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Héctor Fort has begun to earn the trust of new head coach Hansi Flick. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Friday provided an insight into the…
